title: antidesma venenosum
intro: Antidesma venenosum, also known as the poisonous ironwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant is native to tropical regions of Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant has been used to treat a variety of health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It can be prepared in herbal preparations such as tea, infusions, or tinctures, and has been found to have potential health benefits, including antioxidant and immune-boosting effects.
